entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explore the basic tenets of qualitative analysis (preliminary analysis, tests in solution and confirmatory test)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to explain the concept of qualitative analysis and make presentations
Laboratory activity: Guide students to carry-out qualitative analysis and confirmatory tests for various salts
entries.assessment: The basic tenets of qualitative analysis are clearly decribed
resources: Qualitative analysis reagents
apparatus for qualitative analysis
qualitative analysis sheets, wall charts and samples of salts
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Explore the basic tenets of Organic Chemistry (organic compounds; aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of Organic Chemistry
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to describe categories of hydrocarbons and alcohols and make presentations
entries.assessment: The basic tenets of Organic Chemistry are clearly explained
resources: Molecular models and organic substances present in environment
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic terminologies in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Use the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry nomenclature to name chemical species
entries.learning_activity: (a) Use Chemistry software to draw organic structures of hydrocarbons and alcohols with 1 carbon to 10 carbon atoms
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to use the Chemistry software to draw organic structures of organic compounds such as hydrocarbons and alcohols
entries.assessment: Organic structures of hydrocarbons and alcohols with 1 carbon to 10 carbon atoms are correctly drawn using the Chemistry software
resources: Chemistry-based computer software, organic model and wall chart
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to use the Chemistry software to draw organic structures of organic compounds such as hydrocarbons and alcohols

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic terminologies in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Use the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry nomenclature to name chemical species
entries.learning_activity: (b) Name aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols with 1 carbon to 10 carbon atoms using the IUPAC system and Chemistry software
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to identify and name the first ten compounds of aliphatic hydrocarbons using IUPAC system and chemistry software, and make presentation
Laboratory observations: Guide students to make laboratory observations of labels on containers of hydrocarbons and alcohols
entries.assessment: Aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols with 1 carbon to 10 carbon atoms are correctly named using IUPAC system
resources: Wall charts showing structures of hydrocarbons, molecular model kits, bottles/ containers containing labelled hydrocarbons and alcohols
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic terminologies in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Use the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry nomenclature to name chemical species

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic terminologies in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Use chemical symbols, formulae and equations to represent chemical reaction
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the chemical reactions of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols in relation to their structures
teaching_learning_activities: Gallery walk: Guide students to describe chemical reactions and make presentations
Role play: Guide students to demonstrate on the structures of aliphatic hydrocarbons and write report
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to describe reactions of alcohols and make presentations
entries.assessment: Chemical reactions of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols are described clearly in relation to their structures
resources: Wall charts, pictures and videos showing chemical reactions of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Investigate the composition of chemical species in substances using systematic qualitative analysis
teaching_learning_activities: Inquiry-based learning: Assign students to investigate on the composition of substances using appropriate qualitative analysis procedures
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to describe the behaviours/ properties for cations and anions in a chemical reactions
entries.assessment: The composition of chemical species in substances using systematic qualitative analysis are correctly investigated
resources: Qualitative analysis reagents
apparatus for qualitative analysis
qualitative analysis sheets, wall charts and samples of salts
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Demonstrate the local and industrial preparations of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols
teaching_learning_activities: Hands-on-minds on: Guide students to demonstrate local and industrial preparations of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols and write the reports
Experimentation: Assign students to perform experiment on reactions involving preparations of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols
entries.assessment: The local and industrial preparation of aliphatic hydrocarbons and alcohols are clearly demonstrated
resources: Wall charts showing distillers, and relevant chemicals and solvents for preparation of alcohols and hydrocarbons with 1 carbon to 10 carbon atoms
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct a project in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct a project in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Complete and submit a report for the project started in Form Three
teaching_learning_activities: Project works: Guide students to apply Chemistry principles to investigate scientific processes such as water purification, environmental user- friendly metal extraction and purification, food processing and beverage production
entries.assessment: Scientific report of the project is clearly written and quality project product(s) are obtained
resources: Samples, project guidelines, sample of project reports and chemistry based software
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
